title: T4114 Canada Child Benefit and related provincial and territorial programs - Canada.ca
content:
## T4114 Canada Child Benefit and related provincial and territorial programs
This booklet explains who is eligible for the Canada Child Tax Benefit, how to apply for it, how we calculate it, and when we make payments.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format t4114-e.html PDF t4114-25e.pdf Large print t4114-lp-25e.pdf

### Read the publication
- Online format t4114-e.html
- Large print t4114-lp-25e.pdf
- Ask for an alternate format You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
